title: lozanella permollis
intro: Lozanella permollis is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of thistle. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lozanella permollis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Lozanella permollis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
